instruction: The Tokyo ops work is already partly underway. Please check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish what's missing, close out the open work, send team@example.com a recap, and leave the existing pieces alone.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Tokyo ops work is already in motion. Please check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send team@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.
instruction_variants: Some of the Tokyo ops work is already in motion. Check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send team@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the existing Tokyo ops setup, added the missing review, and left the existing task and daily check in place.

initial_state_overrides.ops/ops-resume-notes.txt: Tokyo partial ops notes already captured.

solution_commands: email send --to team@example.com --subject 'Tokyo ops resume recap' --body 'I checked the existing Tokyo ops setup, added the missing review, and left the existing task and daily check in place.'
